title: Amendment Notification Declaring Eco Sensitive Zone S.O. No.2537(E) around Amendment in Environment protection Act, 1986
description: Amendment Notification Declaring Eco Sensitive Zone S.O. No.2537(E) around Amendment in Environment protection Act, 1986
text: 4817 GI/2017 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2229] ubZ fnYyh] cq/okj] vxLr 9] 2017@Jko.k 18] 1939 No. 2229] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 9, 2017/SRAVANA 18, 1939 पयार्वरण, वन और जलवायु पिरवतर्न मंᮢालय अिधसूचना नई िदल्ली, 8 अगस्त, 2017 का.आ. 2537(अ).—केन्ᮤीय सरकार, पयार् वरण (संरक्षण) अिधिनयम, 1986 (1986 का 29) की धारा 6 और धारा 25 ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते हु ए पयार् वरण (संरक्षण) िनयम, 1986 का और सं शोधन करने के िलए िन᳜िलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथार्त्:— 1. (1) इन िनयमᲂ का संिक्ष᳙ नाम पयार् वरण (संरक्षण) सं शोधन िनयम, 2017 है। (2) ये राजपᮢ म ᱶ ᮧकाशन की तारीख को ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे। 2. पयार्वरण (संरक्षण) िनयम, 1986 के िनयम 5 के उप-िनयम (3) के खंड (घ) मᱶ “पांच सौ पᱹतािलस िदन” शब्दᲂ के स् थान पर “आपवािदक पिरिस्थितयᲂ म ᱶ असम, मेघालय, अरुणाचल ᮧदे श, िमजोरम, मिणपुर, नागालᱹड, िᮢपु रा, िसिᲥम और जम्मू - कश्मीर राज्यᲂ के संबंध मᱶ और एक सौ अस्सी िदन की और अविध के भीतर पयार्᳙ कारणᲂ के िलए” अंतःस्थािपत िकया जाएगा। [फा. सं. 25/156/2015-ईएसजेड] लिलत कपूर, वैज्ञािनक ‘जी’ िटप्पण : मूल िनयम भारत के राजपᮢ म ᱶ का.आ. 844 (अ), तारीख 19 नवंबर, 1986 और का.आ. 82 (अ), तारीख 16 फरवरी, 1987; का.आ. 64 (अ), तारीख 18 जनवरी, 1988; सा.का.िन. 931 (अ), तारीख 27 अक्टू बर, 1989; का.आ. 23 (अ), तारीख 16 जनवरी, 1991; सा.का.िन. 95 (अ), तारीख 12 फरवरी, 1992; सा.का.िन.329 (अ), तारीख 13 माचर्, 1992; सा.का.िन. 562 (अ), तारीख 27 मई, 1992; सा.का.िन. 884 (अ), तारीख 20 नवंबर, 1992; सा.का.िन. 386 (अ), तारीख 22 अᮧैल, 1993; सा.का.िन. 422 (अ), तारीख 19 मई, 1993; सा.का.िन.801 (अ), तारीख 31 िदसम्बर, 1993; सा.का.िन. 320 (अ), तारीख 16 माचर्, 1994; सा.का.िन.560 (अ), तारीख 19 िसतंबर, 1997; सा.का.िन.378 (अ), तारीख 30 जून, 1998; सां.का.िन. 7, तारीख 22 िदसम्बर, 1998; सा.का.िन. 407 (अ), तारीख 31 म ई, 2001; सा.का.िन.826 (अ), तारीख 16 नवंबर, 2009; और सा.का.िन.513 (अ), तारीख 28 जून, 2012 ᳇ारा उनमᱶ प᳟ातवतᱮ सं शोधन िकए गए । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—S EC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th August, 2017 S.O. 2537(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sections 6 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in clause (d) of sub-rule (3) of rule 5, after the words “five hundred and forty five days”, the words “, and in respect of the States of Assam, Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh, Mizoram, Manipur, Nagaland, Tripura, Sikkim and Jammu and Kashmir in exceptional circumstance and for sufficient reasons within a further period of one hundred and eighty days,” shall be inserted. [F. No. 25/156/2015-ESZ] LALIT KAPUR, Scientist ‘G’ Note : The principal rules were published vide number S.O. 844 (E), dated the 19th November, 1986 and subsequently amended vide numbers S.O. 82 (E), dated the 16th February, 1987; S.O. 64 (E), dated the 18th January, 1988; G.S.R. 931 (E), dated the 27th October, 1989; S.O. 23 (E), dated the 16th January, 1991; G.S.R. 95 (E), dated the 12th February, 1992; G.S.R. 329 (E), dated the 13th March, 1992; G.S.R. 562 (E), dated the 27th May, 1992; G.S.R. 884 (E), dated the 20th November, 1992; G.S.R. 386 (E), dated the 22nd April, 1993; G.S.R. 422 (E), dated the 19th May, 1993; G.S.R. 801 (E), dated the 31st December, 1993; G.S.R. 320 (E), dated the 16th March, 1994; G.S.R. 560 (E), dated the 19th September, 1997; G.S.R. 378 (E), dated the 30th June, 1998 ; G.S.R. 7, dated the 22nd December, 1998; G.S.R. 407 (E), dated the 31st May, 2001; G.S.R. 826 (E), dated the 16th November, 2009; and G.S.R. 513 (E), dated the 28th June, 2012. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
